title: IDI HARISI RAKARERUKA KURIPARIDZA
english_title: Truth is Not Easy to Preach
author: ABASID 1841
description: Teaching from THE ABASID CALIPHATE collection: IDI HARISI RAKARERUKA KURIPARIDZA (Truth is Not Easy to Preach)

verses.text: 25.IDI HARISI RAKARERUKA KURIPARIDZA 15/01/26 Muno ona zvinoitika ,
Asi nhau dzandiri kutaura panongoita 11 vari kuti IDI.
Saka imi muno fanira kuziva kuti basa iri harisi nyore,
Chokwadi chandataura nhasi mukawana anotaura matauriro iwawa mundi vhunze.
Kana muka kwanisa kuzo kwana 1000 vanhu muno mozondi shevedza.
Ndokuti next time munzwisise kuti kudada hakuna mubairo.
Isiri kuzo kwana nyore 🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻 Sarai ne kupenya
Ndiratidzei kuti muno kwanisa ku raura tione
KOMBORERWAI mose, ndikasazo wana mava 27 chete

Tichaedza asi mubvunzo wangu ndewekuti vanhu weblack ava kana vakasvipira baba johane vakaramba nhau yake isusu kana tovaudza zvehushe hwatiinahwo pano vachatinzwawo here mambo 🥲🙏🏻. Ok ndirimo ndinyerere
Ndinoda kuti muone kuti zvino netsa sei kuparidza idi
Kutaura kwandaita nhasi chete, ndatsvagwa ne vanhu 4
Otarisa kuti watuka vanhu here kana kuti wataura idi
Woona kuti inga mazwi ose anga ari ekupona kwavo
